examples: my eyebrows singed when I bent over the flames

meanings.definition: destroy completely by or as if by fire
examples: The wildfire scorched the forest and several homes

meanings.definition: burn slightly and superficially so as to affect color
examples: The cook blackened the chicken breast
The fire charred the ceiling above the mantelpiece

meanings.definition: become scorched or singed under intense heat or dry conditions
examples: The exposed tree scorched in the hot sun

meanings.definition: dried out by heat or excessive exposure to sunlight
examples: land lying baked in the heat
the earth was scorched and bare

meanings.definition: having everything destroyed so nothing is left salvageable by an enemy
